nodes.label: Phasing philosophy: ship smallest thing, additive-only schema
nodes.rationale: Ship the smallest thing that lets 10-15 friends read and lets you measure what they do, before building Premium; Premium-shaped schema exists so adding features later is additive, never a risky migration.
nodes.norm_label: phasing philosophy: ship smallest thing, additive-only schema

nodes.label: Free-tier philosophy: caps generous, not stingy
nodes.rationale: A cap that bites too early kills the habit before it forms; caps should sit above what a normal engaged reader hits in 2-4 weeks so the wall only appears once someone is already dependent, making 'go unlimited' read as relief. translations_per_day is a daily rate limit (not a collection cap) and is set more generously since it's most likely to interrupt an immersive session.
nodes.norm_label: free-tier philosophy: caps generous, not stingy

nodes.label: The Premium message: 'helps you remember what you read'
nodes.rationale: Don't market Premium as 'unlimited translations' -- vocabulary/quotes/SRS/insights are all in service of one pitch: helping you remember what you read.
nodes.norm_label: the premium message: 'helps you remember what you read'
